title: cirsium × urbanum
intro: Cirsium × urbanum, also known as the urban thistle, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to Europe. The medicinal properties of Cirsium × urbanum lie in its leaves, flowers, and roots, which contain flavonoids, sesquiterpenes, and other compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antibacterial properties, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. Cirsium × urbanum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, fever, and other health concerns.
